name: pil-grayscale-method-flag
description: Add a --grayscale-method CLI flag to expose multiple RGB-to-grayscale strategies (luma, average, max) via PIL. Use when: (1) a script uses PIL convert('L') and needs configurable grayscale strategies, (2) adding new --method-style flags to image preprocessing scripts, (3) fixing broken tests that call len() on PIL Images or pass raw bytes to PIL-accepting functions.
